step.details: Copy contents from lib/db-orgs.ts with these changes: - Change import: `import { getSql } from "./connection"` (was "./db") - Keep all functions and types exactly as-is

Add these exports: ```typescript // Organization operations export { createOrganization, getOrganizationById, getOrganizationBySlug, updateOrganization, deleteOrganization, getAllOrganizations, getOrganizationMembers, addOrganizationMember, updateMemberRole, removeMember, getUserOrganizations, isUserMemberOfOrg, createOrgInvite, getOrgInvites, } from "./orgs"
// Types export type { Organization, OrganizationMember, OrganizationWithRole, } from "./types" ```

consumers.consumer: Change: `import type { Organization } from "@/lib/db-orgs"` To: `import type { Organization } from "@/lib/db"`

Change: `import { getUserOrganizations, createOrganization, getOrganizationBySlug } from "@/lib/db-orgs"` To: `import { getUserOrganizations, createOrganization, getOrganizationBySlug } from "@/lib/db"`
Change: `import { updateMemberRole, removeMember } from "@/lib/db-orgs"` To: `import { updateMemberRole, removeMember } from "@/lib/db"`
Change: `import { getOrganizationById, updateOrganization, deleteOrganization } from "@/lib/db-orgs"` To: `import { getOrganizationById, updateOrganization, deleteOrganization } from "@/lib/db"`
Change: `import { addOrganizationMember } from "@/lib/db-orgs"` To: `import { addOrganizationMember } from "@/lib/db"`
Change: `import { getAllOrganizations } from "@/lib/db-orgs"` To: `import { getAllOrganizations } from "@/lib/db"`

constraints.constraint: No functional changes - pure structural refactoring
Build must pass before deleting original file

task.success_criteria: - lib/db/orgs.ts created with correct import - Types added to lib/db/types.ts - All exports added to lib/db/index.ts - All 7 consumer imports updated - lib/db-orgs.ts deleted - Build passes

mandatory_final_step.description: Update the feature's status.md file with execution results.
mandatory_final_step.action:
After completing all steps, UPDATE the file: docs/prompts/remaining-db-refactoring/status.md
with: - Date: Get from system (date -u +"%Y-%m-%dT%H:%M:%SZ") - Prompt: phases/01_migrate_orgs.xml - Phase: 01 - Migrate Organizations - Status: completed | partial | blocked - Summary of what was done - Any issues encountered - Next: phases/02_migrate_wishlist.xml

mandatory_commit_step.commit_format: feat(remaining-db-refactoring): phase-01 - Migrate lib/db-orgs.ts to lib/db/orgs.ts
mandatory_commit_step.action: 1. Stage: git add lib/db/ app/ docs/prompts/remaining-db-refactoring/ 2. Commit with format above 3. Note: Do NOT delete lib/db-orgs.ts until build passes
